## Text
clean_text: ```
# Quarterly Business Report - Q4 2025

## Executive Summary

<metric type="financial" period="year-over-year">
  <name>Revenue</name>
  <change direction="increase" unit="percent">15</change>
  <value unit="USD" scale="billion">4.2</value>
</metric>, driven by strong performance in <business_segment>cloud services</business_segment> and <business_segment>enterprise software</business_segment>. 

<metric type="financial" period="quarterly">
  <name>Operating margin</name>
  <value unit="percent">28</value>
  <change direction="increase" comparison="Q3">up from <previous_value unit="percent">24</previous_value></change>
</metric>. 

<metric type="operational">
  <name>Customer acquisition cost</name>
  <change direction="decrease" unit="percent">12</change>
  <reason>improved marketing efficiency</reason>
</metric>. 

<expansion type="geographic">
  The company expanded into <count>3</count> new markets:
  <market_list>
    <market>Southeast Asia</market>
    <market>Eastern Europe</market>
    <market>South America</market>
  </market_list>
</expansion>

## Key Metrics

<metric type="user_engagement">
  <name>Active users</name>
  <value unit="million">45</value>
  <change direction="increase" unit="percent">22</change>
</metric>

<metric type="financial" period="monthly" recurring="true">
  <name>Monthly recurring revenue</name>
  <value unit="USD" scale="million">350</value>
</metric>

<metric type="satisfaction">
  <name>Net promoter score</name>
  <value>71</value>
  <change direction="increase">improved from <previous_value>62</previous_value></change>
</metric>

<metric type="organizational">
  <name>Employee headcount</name>
  <value>8,500</value>
  <distribution>across <count>12</count> offices globally</distribution>
</metric>

<metric type="investment">
  <name>R&D investment</name>
  <value unit="USD" scale="million">840</value>
  <percentage_of_revenue unit="percent">20</percentage_of_revenue>
</metric>

## Outlook

<forecast period="Q1 2026">
  <metric type="financial">
    <name>Revenue</name>
    <range>
      <min unit="USD" scale="billion">4.4</min>
      <max unit="USD" scale="billion">4.6</max>
    </range>
  </metric>
  
  <strategic_initiatives>
    <initiative priority="1">
      <action>launching</action>
      <description>AI-powered analytics platform</description>
    </initiative>
    <initiative priority="2">
      <action>expanding</action>
      <description>partner ecosystem</description>
    </initiative>
    <initiative priority="3">
      <action>achieving</action>
      <description>SOC 2 Type II certification for all cloud products</description>
    </initiative>
  </strategic_initiatives>
</forecast>
```

outputs.name: pages

text.text:
# Quarterly Business Report - Q4 2025


## Executive Summary

Revenue grew 15% year-over-year to $4.2 billion, driven by strong performance in cloud services and
enterprise software. Operating margin improved to 28%, up from 24% in Q3. Customer acquisition cost
decreased by 12% due to improved marketing efficiency. The company expanded into three new
markets: Southeast Asia, Eastern Europe, and South America.


## Key Metrics

Active users reached 45 million, a 22% increase. Monthly recurring revenue hit $350M. Net promoter
score improved from 62 to 71. Employee headcount grew to 8,500 across 12 offices globally. R&D;
investment was $840M, representing 20% of revenue.


## Outlook

For Q1 2026, we expect revenue between $4.4B and $4.6B. Key initiatives include launching the
AI-powered analytics platform, expanding the partner ecosystem, and achieving SOC 2 Type II
certification for all cloud products.

inputs.name: pages

text.text:
# Quarterly Business Report - Q4 2025


## Executive Summary

Revenue grew 15% year-over-year to $4.2 billion, driven by strong performance in cloud services and
enterprise software. Operating margin improved to 28%, up from 24% in Q3. Customer acquisition cost
decreased by 12% due to improved marketing efficiency. The company expanded into three new
markets: Southeast Asia, Eastern Europe, and South America.


## Key Metrics

Active users reached 45 million, a 22% increase. Monthly recurring revenue hit $350M. Net promoter
score improved from 62 to 71. Employee headcount grew to 8,500 across 12 offices globally. R&D;
investment was $840M, representing 20% of revenue.


## Outlook

For Q1 2026, we expect revenue between $4.4B and $4.6B. Key initiatives include launching the
AI-powered analytics platform, expanding the partner ecosystem, and achieving SOC 2 Type II
certification for all cloud products.

Customer acquisition cost decreased by 12% due to improved marketing efficiency. The company expanded into three new markets: Southeast Asia, Eastern Europe, and South America.

## Key Metrics

inputs.data_html:
# Quarterly Business Report - Q4 2025

## Executive Summary

Revenue grew 15% year-over-year to $4.2 billion, driven by strong performance in cloud services and enterprise software. Operating margin improved to 28%, up from 24% in Q3. Customer acquisition cost decreased by 12% due to improved marketing efficiency. The company expanded into three new markets: Southeast Asia, Eastern Europe, and South America.

## Key Metrics

Active users reached 45 million, a 22% increase. Monthly recurring revenue hit $350M. Net promoter score improved from 62 to 71. Employee headcount grew to 8,500 across 12 offices globally. R&D investment was $840M, representing 20% of revenue.

## Outlook

For Q1 2026, we expect revenue between $4.4B and $4.6B. Key initiatives include launching the AI-powered analytics platform, expanding the partner ecosystem, and achieving SOC 2 Type II certification for all cloud products.

outputs.name: enriched

data.text:
# Quarterly Business Report - Q4 2025

## Executive Summary

<metric type="financial" period="year-over-year">
  <name>Revenue</name>
  <change direction="increase" unit="percent">15</change>
  <value unit="USD" scale="billion">4.2</value>
</metric>, driven by strong performance in <business_segment>cloud services</business_segment> and <business_segment>enterprise software</business_segment>. 

<metric type="financial" period="quarterly">
  <name>Operating margin</name>
  <value unit="percent">28</value>
  <change direction="increase" comparison="Q3">up from <previous_value unit="percent">24</previous_value></change>
</metric>. 

<metric type="operational">
  <name>Customer acquisition cost</name>
  <change direction="decrease" unit="percent">12</change>
  <reason>improved marketing efficiency</reason>
</metric>. 

<expansion type="geographic">
  The company expanded into <count>3</count> new markets:
  <market_list>
    <market>Southeast Asia</market>
    <market>Eastern Europe</market>
    <market>South America</market>
  </market_list>
</expansion>

## Key Metrics

<metric type="user_engagement">
  <name>Active users</name>
  <value unit="million">45</value>
  <change direction="increase" unit="percent">22</change>
</metric>

<metric type="financial" period="monthly" recurring="true">
  <name>Monthly recurring revenue</name>
  <value unit="USD" scale="million">350</value>
</metric>

<metric type="satisfaction">
  <name>Net promoter score</name>
  <value>71</value>
  <change direction="increase">improved from <previous_value>62</previous_value></change>
</metric>

<metric type="organizational">
  <name>Employee headcount</name>
  <value>8,500</value>
  <distribution>across <count>12</count> offices globally</distribution>
</metric>

<metric type="investment">
  <name>R&D investment</name>
  <value unit="USD" scale="million">840</value>
  <percentage_of_revenue unit="percent">20</percentage_of_revenue>
</metric>

## Outlook

<forecast period="Q1 2026">
  <metric type="financial">
    <name>Revenue</name>
    <range>
      <min unit="USD" scale="billion">4.4</min>
      <max unit="USD" scale="billion">4.6</max>
    </range>
  </metric>
  
  <strategic_initiatives>
    <initiative priority="1">
      <action>launching</action>
      <description>AI-powered analytics platform</description>
    </initiative>
    <initiative priority="2">
      <action>expanding</action>
      <description>partner ecosystem</description>
    </initiative>
    <initiative priority="3">
      <action>achieving</action>
      <description>SOC 2 Type II certification for all cloud products</description>
    </initiative>
  </strategic_initiatives>
</forecast>

outputs.data_text:
Quarterly Business Report - Q4 2025                                 

Executive Summary                                                                                   





Key Metrics                                                                                         






Outlook                                                                                             





















<strategic_initiatives>  launching AI-powered analytics platform   expanding partner ecosystem      
achieving SOC 2 Type II certification for all cloud products  </strategic_initiatives>

Revenue grew 15% year-over-year to $4.2 billion, driven by strong performance in cloud services and enterprise software. Operating margin improved to 28%, up from 24% in Q3. Customer acquisition cost decreased by 12% due to improved marketing efficiency. The company expanded into three new markets: Southeast Asia, Eastern Europe, and South America.

## Key Metrics

Active users reached 45 million, a 22% increase. Monthly recurring revenue hit $350M. Net promoter score improved from 62 to 71. Employee headcount grew to 8,500 across 12 offices globally. R&D investment was $840M, representing 20% of revenue.

## Outlook

For Q1 2026, we expect revenue between $4.4B and $4.6B. Key initiatives include launching the AI-powered analytics platform, expanding the partner ecosystem, and achieving SOC 2 Type II certification for all cloud products.
